DocumentationSubject.Summary: A model-first metadata foundation with isomorphic XML, SQL, and C# surfaces and generated tooling.
A model-driven BI stack from source contracts and transform syntax through execution and analytical targets.
Command-line tools for BI modeling, conversion, validation, and execution.
Model references for the sanctioned BI metadata workspaces.
A model-driven BI stack from source contracts and transform syntax through execution and analytical targets.
Command-line tools for the core metadata foundation.
Model references for the core metadata foundation.
A model-first metadata foundation with isomorphic XML, SQL, and C# surfaces and generated tooling.
Command-line and model references for the current public MetaDocs suite.
Author shared analytics semantics for dimensions, hierarchies, measures, facts, and security across semantic model targets.
Declare a base measure aggregate function.
MetaAnalytics workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Add a typed table attribute or calculated attribute.
Add object-level security for an attribute.
MetaAnalytics workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Declare an attribute relationship inside a table.
MetaAnalytics workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
MetaAnalytics workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Whether the attribute is a key.

MetaAnalytics workspace. Defaults to the current directory.

MetaAnalytics workspace. Defaults to the current directory.

Declare one attribute as the sort key for another.
MetaAnalytics workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Add object-level security for a table.
MetaAnalytics workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
MetaAnalytics workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
MetaAnalytics workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Directory where the MetaAnalytics workspace will be created.
Build deterministic metadata workspaces that can be reviewed in XML, projected into SQL, and consumed through typed C# tooling without changing the represented model.
Insert many instances from tsv/csv input.
Show inbound relationships for an entity.
Import CSV data into a workspace.
Import SQL metadata into a new workspace.
Diff instance data for two workspaces with byte-identical model.xml.
Diff mapped instance data using an explicit alignment workspace.
Apply an equal-model instance diff artifact to a target workspace.
Apply an aligned instance diff artifact to a target workspace.
Target entity, relationship role, or implied relationship field name, followed by target instance id.
Add a property to an entity.
Convert a property into a relationship.
Convert a relationship into a property.
Change whether a property is required.
Show workspace summary and model/instance sizes.
Merge two full workspaces into a new workspace.
Author CLI command surfaces that drive shared parsing, help, and runtime binding for meta tools.
Add one allowed value for a value shape.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Add an option available to all commands.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.

MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Add a command option with its first token.
Add an additional token for an option.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Add another parameter to a group.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Define how many values a parameter accepts.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
MetaCli workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Convert between sanctioned BI workspaces, including schema, vault, warehouse, SQL, transform, analytics, tabular, and multidimensional models.
Convert MetaAnalytics workspace to MetaMultiDimensional workspace.
Output workspace or script folder path.
Source workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
Convert MetaAnalytics workspace to MetaTabular workspace.
Output workspace or script folder path.
Source workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
Convert MetaBusinessDataVault workspace to MetaSql workspace.
Source workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
Convert promoted MetaDataQuality candidates to SQL data-quality views.
Output workspace or script folder path.
Source workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
Convert MetaDataWarehouse workspace to MetaSql workspace.
Source workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
Convert MetaRawDataVault workspace to MetaSql workspace.
Source workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
Convert MetaSchema workspace to MetaRawDataVault workspace.
Source field name to ignore. May be repeated.
Source field suffix to ignore. May be repeated.
Directory where the MetaRawDataVault workspace will be created.
Convert MetaSql SQL modules to MetaTransformScript workspace.
Create an empty MetaTransformScript workspace when selected module kinds have no convertible modules.
Convert function modules. If no include switch is provided, all module kinds are selected.
Convert stored procedure modules. If no include switch is provided, all module kinds are selected.
Convert view modules. If no include switch is provided, all module kinds are selected.
Source MetaSql workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
Convert MetaTransformScript SQL modules to MetaSql workspace.
Source MetaTransformScript workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
Promote modeled transform and schema evidence into data quality views, review surfaces, and operational SQL.
Create generated DQ views from a full MetaTransformScript workspace.
MetaTransformBinding workspace used to scan only validated scripts.
Directory where the generated MetaDataQuality workspace will be created.
Review the generated DQ pack and optional adjustments.
Include candidate ids in adjustment output. Implies --show-cases.
Show up to n candidate cases. Implies --show-cases.
MetaDataQuality workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Promote generated DQ candidates for SQL output.
Promote one generated candidate. May be provided more than once.
Promote generated candidates of one candidate family. May be provided more than once.
MetaDataQuality workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Choose all candidates, explicit candidate ids, or candidate families.
Author sanctioned data type catalogs used by schema, SQL, conversion, and BI modeling tools.
Directory where the sanctioned workspace will be created.
Author conversion rules that map data types across platforms with explicit length, precision, scale, and fallback behavior.
MetaDataTypeConversion workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Directory where the sanctioned workspace will be created.
Resolve one source data type id through the sanctioned mappings.
Source data type id to resolve.
Target data type system when the source type has mappings to several target systems.
MetaDataTypeConversion workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Author business Data Vault models that shape raw vault structures into governed business hubs, links, satellites, and deployable SQL.

Author, browse, merge, validate, and render modeled documentation workspaces for the meta and meta-bi suite.
Add or update a structured example for an existing documentation subject.
Add or update a code block in a structured documentation example.
Read code text from standard input.
Previous code block id for ordered code in the same section.
MetaDocs workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.
Add or update a text section in a structured documentation example.
Read example section text from standard input.
Previous section id for ordered sections in the same example.
MetaDocs workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.
Read the first example section text from standard input.
Previous example id for ordered examples on the same subject.
Stable id for the first example section.
MetaDocs workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.
Add or update an authored documentation page in a MetaDocs workspace.
Optional authored documentation source display name.
Page title and subject display name.
Set this page as the default documentation view root.
Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.
Documentation path to browse, for example cli/meta-sql/deploy.
MetaDocs workspace to browse. Defaults to the current directory.
List the documentation contents as a navigable tree.
Optional documentation view id, name, or title.
MetaDocs workspace to list. Defaults to the current directory.
Refresh CLI reference documentation from a MetaCli workspace while preserving authored descriptions.
Optional MetaCli application id when the source workspace contains more than one application.
New MetaDocs source workspace to create.
Optional parent subject id for the imported CLI application.
Stable documentation source id. Keep it fixed so authored descriptions stay attached.
Source MetaCli workspace to refresh reference documentation from.
Existing MetaDocs source workspace to refresh in place.
Import selected workspace instance documentation from a modeled opt-in policy.
Optional source id used by import-workspace-model, for linking instance docs to model docs.
Optional stable documentation source id for imported instance docs.
Source Meta workspace whose allowed instances should be documented.
Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place. Defaults to the current directory.
Refresh model reference documentation from a Meta workspace while preserving authored descriptions.
New MetaDocs source workspace to create.
Optional parent subject id for the imported model subject.
Stable documentation source id. Keep it fixed so authored descriptions stay attached.
Source Meta workspace to refresh model reference documentation from.
Existing MetaDocs source workspace to refresh in place.
Add or update an opt-in entity policy for workspace instance documentation.
Optional property used only as the imported instance display name.
Source workspace entity name to include.
Optional model documentation source id this policy applies to. Omit for a global policy.
Optional property used only as the imported instance summary.
Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place. Defaults to the current directory.
Add or update an opt-in property policy for workspace instance documentation.
Property name to import as a generated fact.
Optional model documentation source id this policy applies to. Omit for a global policy.
Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place. Defaults to the current directory.
Add or update an opt-in relationship policy for workspace instance documentation.
Relationship selector, navigation name, or relationship column name.
Optional model documentation source id this policy applies to. Omit for a global policy.
Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place. Defaults to the current directory.
Rebuild a suite workspace from source MetaDocs workspaces.
Source MetaDocs workspace to include. Repeat for many workspaces.
Suite workspace to rebuild. Defaults to the current directory.
Render a MetaDocs workspace as a static documentation site.
Output directory. The merged page is written as docs.html.
MetaDocs workspace to render. Defaults to the current directory.
Search documentation subjects, descriptions, and details.
MetaDocs workspace to search. Defaults to the current directory.
Add or update an authored description for an existing documentation subject.
Read authored description body from standard input.
Description slot to add or update. Default: Summary.
Optional description title. Defaults to the slot.
MetaDocs workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.
Validate a MetaDocs workspace lifecycle and reference integrity.
MetaDocs workspace to validate. Defaults to the current directory.
Narrative body format. Defaults to Markdown.
Navigation label for the page. Defaults to the page title when first authored.
Documentation subject type. Defaults to Guide.
Filter results by documentation subject type.
Define repository workflows as declared workspaces and executable operation steps, then validate and run them from a model.
MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Add one executable step to an operation.
Read executable arguments from standard input.
Executable or script command to run.
Exit code that marks the step as successful. Defaults to 0.
Working directory, absolute or relative to the mesh root.
MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Model name hosted by the workspace.
Workspace path, absolute or relative to the mesh root.
MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Empty target directory for the MetaMesh workspace.
Root path used to resolve relative workspace paths.
MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Run the steps declared for one operation.
MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Show workspace paths and step commands.
MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Validate one operation before running it.
MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.

Create modeled multidimensional database objects, including data source views, and process unless --no-process is used; processing failures fail the command.
Target database name. Defaults to the modeled database name.
Drop an existing target database before create/deploy.
Deploy metadata only and skip full processing.
Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
Drop a multidimensional database from an Analysis Services multidimensional instance with no confirmation prompt.
Promote a processed multidimensional database through backup and restore for pre-prod-to-prod promotion; restore does not process.
Backup file path accessible to the Analysis Services service accounts.
Drop an existing target database before restore.
Source Analysis Services server containing the processed database.
Infer, author, and execute orchestration plans with task ordering, concurrency policy, and run evidence.
Record an explicit success or failure dependency between tasks.
Whether the successor follows predecessor success or failure.
Object selector for object-scoped dependency resolution.
Reason recorded with the policy row.
MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Record an explicit success dependency/order resolution in an orchestration workspace.
Object selector for object-scoped dependency resolution.
Reason recorded with the policy row.
MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Allow concurrent execution for multiple Append effects on one object.
Data object whose append writers can overlap.
Reason recorded with the policy row.
MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Execute the current run plan by coordinating meta-pipeline worker processes.
Conversion policy workspace passed to child workers.
Maximum concurrently granted pipeline tasks. Default: 1.
Operational DB connection environment variable passed to child workers.
MetaPipeline workspace used by child pipeline workers.
Operational root for run journals, worker logs, and workspace execution leases.
Startup/activation timeout. Omitted follows --worker-event-timeout-seconds; 0 disables activation timeout.
Timeout while waiting for child workers to connect to the named pipe. 0 or omitted means no timeout.
Timeout for silent worker protocol periods. 0 or omitted means no timeout.
MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Explain one analyzer issue and its participating pipelines.
Issue id or unique issue code.
MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Infer a MetaOrchestration workspace from a modeled MetaPipeline workspace.
Description recorded on the orchestration plan.
Directory where the MetaOrchestration workspace will be created.
Inspect the planned task dependency graph.
MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
List analyzer issues recorded in an orchestration workspace.
MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Refresh lock-aware run-plan rows in an orchestration workspace.
MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Record scoped lock compatibility for one object/effect interaction.
Lock behavior for the object/effect pair.
Left write effect, such as Append, Replace, Mutation, KeyedUpsert, or ConditionalKeyedUpsert.
Data object whose effect interaction is being resolved.
Reason recorded with the policy row.
Right write effect, such as Append, Replace, Mutation, KeyedUpsert, or ConditionalKeyedUpsert.
MetaOrchestration workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Author and execute modeled pipelines with task dependencies, workspace fingerprints, SQL execution, and operational run evidence.
Append one executable-backed task instance to the pipeline's serial task chain.
Raw command-line arguments passed to the executable.
Executable path or executable name resolvable by the operating system.
Pipeline that receives the new serial step.
Step name; omitted derives a deterministic name from the executable file name.
Process timeout seconds. 0 or omitted means no timeout.
Existing MetaPipeline workspace to update. Defaults to the current working directory.
Add one Pipeline instance to a MetaPipeline workspace.
Existing MetaPipeline workspace to update. Defaults to the current working directory.
Append one transform-backed task instance to the pipeline's serial task chain.
Bounded in-memory row buffer size for InsertRows. Default: 1000.
Binding id when the selected script has multiple bindings.
MetaTransformBinding workspace used for binding selection.
Environment variable named by the modeled execution connection.
Pipeline that receives the new serial step.
Step name; omitted derives a deterministic name from the script name.
Target table identifier when a SELECT binding has multiple targets.
Environment variable named by the modeled target connection.
InsertRows target type family. Default: SqlServer.
SELECT-kind target write model. The only supported value is insert-rows.
SQL command and bulk-copy timeout seconds. 0 or omitted means no timeout.
MetaTransformScript workspace used for script selection.
Existing MetaPipeline workspace to update. Defaults to the current working directory.
Create or update the SQL Server MetaPipeline operational DB for diagnostic logs, audit logs, metrics, and failures; it does not store model truth.
Environment variable with a SQL Server connection string that can create the database.
Execute a modeled pipeline's serial task chain with compact live progress including B/KB/MB/GB rate.
Execute one SQL Server transform script with script selection options and compact live progress including B/KB/MB/GB rate.
Bounded in-memory row buffer size. Default: 1000.
Binding id when the selected script has multiple bindings.
MetaTransformBinding workspace containing script binding rows.
Conversion policy workspace; omitted uses built-in defaults.
Environment variable for the execution SQL Server connection.
Environment variable for an initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.
Target table identifier when a SELECT binding has multiple targets.
Environment variable for the target SQL Server connection.
Runtime target type family for InsertRows. Default: SqlServer.
SQL command and bulk-copy timeout seconds. 0 or omitted means no command timeout.
Execute exactly one modeled pipeline task by task name or id; diagnostic surface, while orchestration uses execute-worker.
MetaTransformBinding workspace path used for operational run context.
Conversion policy workspace; omitted uses built-in defaults.
Environment variable for an initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.
Pipeline task name or id to execute.
MetaTransformScript workspace path used for operational run context.
MetaPipeline workspace. Defaults to the current working directory.
Execute a modeled pipeline as an orchestration worker boundary over a named pipe; stdout and stderr are diagnostics only; preserves that pipeline context and handles GrantTask and StopPipeline.
MetaTransformBinding workspace path used for operational run context.
Named pipe used for orchestration worker control messages.
Timeout while connecting to the orchestration control pipe. 0 or omitted means no timeout.
Conversion policy workspace; omitted uses built-in defaults.
Pipeline name to execute as a worker.
Environment variable for an initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.
MetaTransformScript workspace path used for operational run context.
MetaPipeline workspace. Defaults to the current working directory.
MetaTransformBinding workspace path used for operational run context.
Conversion policy workspace; omitted uses built-in defaults.
Environment variable for an initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.
MetaTransformScript workspace path used for operational run context.
MetaPipeline workspace. Defaults to the current working directory.
Show a compact MetaPipeline workspace summary.
MetaPipeline workspace to inspect. Defaults to the current working directory.
Create an empty sanctioned MetaPipeline workspace.
Directory where the MetaPipeline workspace will be created.
Prune old completed RunDiagnosticsLog rows while preserving RunLog and audit lineage.
Report eligible rows without deleting them.
Environment variable for the initialized MetaPipeline operational DB.
Delete eligible diagnostic rows older than this retention window.
Extract SQL Server schemas into modeled workspaces that preserve databases, schemas, tables, fields, keys, and relationships.
Extract SQL Server schema into a MetaSchema workspace.
Extract all SQL Server schemas in scope.
Extract all SQL Server tables and views in scope.
Environment variable containing the SQL Server connection string.
Directory where the MetaSchema workspace will be created.
Source system name recorded in the workspace.
Extract one SQL Server table or view.
Extract SQL Server metadata, build deploy plans, apply manifests, and execute SQL against modeled database workspaces.
Apply a deploy manifest after source and live fingerprint validation.
Create a deploy manifest from a source MetaSql workspace and a live SQL Server database.
Approve one exact destructive column drop in the form schema.table.column.
Approve one exact destructive table drop in the form schema.table.
Approve one exact destructive column truncation in the form schema.table.column.
Environment variable containing the SQL Server connection string.
Directory where the deploy manifest workspace will be written.
Source MetaSql workspace to compare with the live database.
Environment variable containing the SQL Server connection string.
Deploy manifest workspace created by deploy-plan.
Source MetaSql workspace used to create the manifest.
Execute a SQL Server file or query for demo, bootstrap, and verification scripts.
Environment variable containing the SQL Server connection string.
Execute SQL from a file. Mutually exclusive with --query.
Execute inline SQL. Mutually exclusive with --file.
Command timeout for each SQL batch. 0 or omitted means no timeout.
Replace one SQLCMD-style $(NAME) token before execution.
Extract SQL Server database objects into a MetaSql workspace.
Create an empty database/schema workspace when no tables or modules match.
Environment variable containing the SQL Server connection string.
Extract function modules. If any include switch is provided, only selected object kinds are extracted.
Extract stored procedure modules. If any include switch is provided, only selected object kinds are extracted.
Extract tables, columns, keys, and indexes. If no include switch is provided, all object kinds are extracted.
Extract view modules. If any include switch is provided, only selected object kinds are extracted.
Directory where the MetaSql workspace will be created.
Extract only one SQL Server schema.
Extract only one table. SQL module extraction is skipped when a table filter is used.
Author and deploy tabular semantic models with tables, relationships, measures, partitions, roles, and processing commands.

Create modeled tabular database objects, including calculation groups, and process unless --no-process is used; processing failures fail the command.
Target database name. Defaults to the modeled database name.
Drop an existing target database before create/deploy.
Deploy metadata only and skip full processing.
Workspace path. Defaults to the current directory.
Drop a tabular database from an Analysis Services tabular instance with no confirmation prompt.
Process an existing tabular database, table, or partition.
Partition name or id to process. Requires --table.
Refresh type. Defaults to Full. Common values: Full, DataOnly, Calculate, ClearValues, Automatic, Add, Defragment.
Table name or id to process instead of the whole database.
Promote a processed tabular database through backup and restore for pre-prod-to-prod promotion; restore does not process.
Backup file path accessible to the Analysis Services service accounts.
Drop an existing target database before restore.
Source Analysis Services server containing the processed database.
Bind transform scripts to source and target schemas so references, data types, and writable contracts are verified before generation.
Bind transform scripts and validate them against source and target schema contracts into a new workspace.
Save only objects that bind and validate successfully.
Optional sanctioned conversion policy workspace. Omitted uses built-in defaults.
Execution context for one/two-part source identifiers.
Required when any one-part source identifier exists.
Comma-separated target columns to exclude from target conformance checks.
Comma-separated target columns to exclude only on target tables where they exist.
Directory where the binding workspace will be created.
TSV report for objects skipped due to binding or validation failure. Requires --allow-partial.
Import SQL transform scripts into a structured model, export equivalent SQL, and manage transform contracts.
Required when SQL code is bare SELECT or mutation text without a CREATE wrapper.
Optional for CREATE VIEW imports; required for bare SELECT; not allowed for inline CREATE FUNCTION or mutation imports.
Add one script to an existing workspace.
Choose either a new workspace or an existing workspace.
Optional for CREATE VIEW imports; required for bare SELECT; not allowed for inline CREATE FUNCTION or mutation imports.
Add one script to an existing workspace.
Choose either a new workspace or an existing workspace.
Import many .sql files from an explicit manifest.
TSV manifest with a Path column and optional Target column.
Print one progress line per imported file.
Add successful imports to an existing workspace.
Choose either a new workspace or an existing workspace.
Add or replace stored procedure contract metadata.
Human note stored on the contract.
Declare a result column for a named result rowset.
MetaTransformScript workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.
Remove a stored procedure contract and its declared rows.
MetaTransformScript workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.
Inspect one stored procedure transform script by name.
MetaTransformScript workspace to inspect. Defaults to the current directory.
Derive view target identifiers from transform script names.
Exit successfully even when the pattern updates no target identifiers.
Show what would change without saving the workspace.
Skip view scripts that already have a target identifier.
Pattern matched against TransformScript.Name. Tokens use {name}.
Pattern rendered into TargetSqlIdentifier from captured source tokens.
MetaTransformScript workspace to update. Defaults to the current directory.
Emit one transform script as SQL text.
Required when the workspace contains multiple scripts.
MetaTransformScript workspace to export. Defaults to the current directory.
Emit SQL scripts to a file or folder.
MetaTransformScript workspace to export. Defaults to the current directory.
Map one modeled workspace shape into another with explicit source, target, and field-level rules.
Add a property binding between two model references.
MetaWeave workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Local model alias used by bindings.
MetaWeave workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Validate property bindings across referenced workspaces.
MetaWeave workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Materialize a new workspace from a valid weave.
Empty target directory for the materialized workspace.
MetaWeave workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
Empty target directory for the new MetaWeave workspace.
MetaWeave workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
